summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS OF GLOBAL SHAKING: Brandon shares a prophetic vision concerning a profound physical and spiritual shaking of the earth, distinct from the ongoing conflicts in Israel. He predicts a massive earthquake stretching from British Columbia down to San Francisco, resulting in major casualties and collapsing skyscrapers, alongside a significant tsunami in Alaska and a major earthquake in Japan. Furthermore, he issues a stark warning about mysterious oceanic disturbances, claiming that immense pressure in the earth's crust, influenced by cosmic forces, will release gases and bring unprecedented deep-sea creatures and dead fish to the shores. Despite these catastrophic predictions, Brandon urges believers not to succumb to fear but to rely on their spiritual covenant and take authority over their environments, just as he does by driving around Tulsa to pray against severe weather and intercede for a local revival.

ABSOLUTE DEPENDENCE ON DIVINE GUIDANCE: Brandon emphasizes the absolute necessity of involving God in every single aspect of daily life, using a personal anecdote about power washing his house. He recounts feeling frustrated and initially only asking God for help with a difficult water line, believing he could handle the rest himself. However, he received a profound spiritual correction, making him realize that human beings can do nothing apart from the divine vine, not even mundane tasks. This revelation brought him to tears and reinforced his conviction that believers must cultivate a deep desperation for God's presence, seeking His guidance in everything from household chores to marriage and parenting, rather than relying on human strength or arrogance.

RELENTLESS SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND INTERCESSION: Brandon stresses the critical need for sustained, aggressive intercessory prayer, warning the church against spiritual complacency following minor victories. He uses the fluctuating situations surrounding XRP cryptocurrency and the political landscape involving President Donald Trump as examples of areas requiring continuous prayer. He asserts that the enemy is operating with a severe sense of urgency, meaning believers must maintain a persistent battle stance and pray intensely for Trump's safety against escalating assassination attempts. Drawing historical parallels to the Pensacola revival under John Kilpatrick and the Azusa Street revival led by William Seymour, Brandon reminds his audience that true spiritual breakthroughs are only birthed through years of desperate, humble, and unyielding prayer.

THE VISION OF HEAVENLY SILOS AND THE END-TIME GLORY: Brandon recounts a vivid spiritual vision of massive, varied silos situated on the edge of heaven, filled with a golden substance resembling liquid honey representing the glory of the Lord. As the red hatches on these silos open, this extraordinary glory pours out over the earth, signifying a massive end-time spiritual outpouring.

THE SUPREME MANDATE OF WALKING IN LOVE: Brandon explains that the fundamental qualification for receiving the end-time glory is walking in perfect love and maintaining a forgiving heart. He openly shares his own struggles with frustration and taking offense at critics, acknowledging that God strictly corrected him, urging him to forgive those who are jealous or malicious. He mandates the profound study and memorization of First Corinthians 13 and First John 4, emphasizing that love takes no account of a suffered wrong. He also mentions being instructed to study teachings by Brother Hagin on walking in love, underscoring that without true love and humility, believers completely disqualify themselves from experiencing the impending spiritual harvest.
rawData: [May 20, 2025]-[Love never fails]-[https://youtu.be/irPL_65pXM0]-[Good morning, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. Well, we're so focused on the war stuff. We're so focused on what's going on over there in Israel and all this other stuff that we're forgetting that He said He's going to shake the heavens. He's going to shake the earth. He's going to shake the politics, and He's going to shake the finances. There were five major things He said He was about to shake. And I'm telling you all, there's a major earthquake that's about to take place from British Columbia all the way down to about San Francisco. I saw a major earthquake that's about to take place there. I saw a tsunami wave coming in even into Alaska—something major. And I even told everybody what the Lord told me. He said, "Watch what's in the water." Many people, because it's out of sight, out of mind, are not paying attention to what's in the water. And there will be signs in the days ahead of gases, things, and fish from the depth coming up from the bottom that we've never seen before. All around the world, dead fish will come up from the bottom. They'll go, "What is this? We've never seen it." But it will come up to the top, and things will die on the beaches, and you're going to see things and they'll go, "Where did this come from? Where did these whales come from? Where's this stuff come from?" Because folks, there's stuff that we've never even known existed down there because we've only explored so much of our oceans. But I'm telling you by the spirit of the Lord, what He's told me is we're about to see pressure on the earth's crust. There's something that's interfering with it in outer space. There's something in our galaxy that is interfering with our planet right now that's causing a shifting and a shaking of our earth's crust with the magma and all the lava and all the stuff. And I'm telling you, it's the gases; it's all the pressure of the earth. And to relieve the pressure from what's happening on our earth's crust, we're going to see earthquakes like we've never seen before. And we're going to see volcanoes like we've never even seen before in this generation, up to probably a thousand years. I don't know; I just know that this is going to be a worldwide shaking. It's not just about America, but it's going to be even about Japan. A major earthquake in Japan. Major earthquakes in these areas that you go, "Oh my God." And people are going to see it on the news and they're going to wake up the next day, and I saw even 50,000 people in British Columbia die. 50,000 people. I saw the number, and I saw major buildings falling. I saw major skyscrapers just tipping over—major shaking. And so you say, "Brandon, well, that just scares me." It's not for you to be in fear. A thousand shall fall at your side and 10,000 at your right hand. If you're watching this channel, you're in the right place because I believe in the covenant. I believe just like we have these big storms where they say, "Well, they're going to have tornadoes, everything," no, we take authority over tornadoes. We don't allow tornadoes around this area. We take our authority in this part. And I say, "As long as I have dominion and authority—I don't know how far my authority goes out there"—and I'll teach you all this as we go, but you have authority over your neighborhood. And that's why I drive around. I drive around and pray wherever I put my feet. I start pleading the blood and protecting things, going around schools and doing things what God's called me to do to protect. I say, "No, we're not going to have any major events or hurting people around here." You moved me to this area. I used to do it over where I was in Guthrie, but God said, "I'm moving you out of that area." And He moved us to Tulsa. And now we drive around in Tulsa and we pray over the Tulsa area calling for revival. We drive around. I even go in front of that painting a lot and stay in that neighborhood and pray for revival. But I go there because I'm looking for revival. It's time to get serious. It's time to get serious and expect God to show up and show off in your life. It's time to quit playing church, going and having prayer groups and just expecting a normal prayer group. I'm talking let the Holy Ghost show up and pray through you so much so that we're changing the nations. That's what I pray every single time I do this. I said, "God, let it not be me at all, but let You show up." If it's me, I won't put it out. I said, "Just erase it, Braden. It's just trash." Because if the Holy Spirit isn't there, I'm not there. And it's just me making content. I'm not here to make content for entertainment. If I don't feel a move of the Holy Ghost in a river flow, I'm not releasing it because I'm not here to entertain you. We're here to change nations. And people say, "Well, just put it out anyway." No, I'm not. Like I said, this is a major calling to me. This isn't a job; this is a calling. And people say, "Well, you know, it's not made for you to understand." This is what God's called me to do, and this is what I'm supposed to do is bring prayer to you. And I told Him, I said, "Lord, I'm submitted unto You." So I get still until He speaks. I make a video every day, and if I don't feel it, I don't release it. If I get up and I tell Brad, "That's trash. I'm not releasing that," it's because if I don't feel the power of the Holy Ghost flowing through it, I refuse to waste your time. And that's why I feel like people should be at church. If you don't feel the Holy Ghost, sit down. We've got to get more desperate for Him. And in doing so, He will show up. He will show up in your desperation. I was out power washing the side of my house, and me—I'm going to say this, and you don't know me, but a lot of people think they do—I was power washing my house and I said, "Lord, if I could just have Your help to fix my water line over there, that's all I want to ask You." I was just trying to be humble, like I didn't want to bother Him. And He said, "Brandon, I want to be involved in every area of your life. Nothing is ever too big and nothing is ever too small for Me to want to be involved with it all. I want to be involved in every area of your life." In other words, He said to me, "So you think you can do it on your own on the other things?" When I was power washing, I said, "Well, I don't really need You to help me power wash the house, but I really need help with that water thing over there." But He said, "You think you can do it on your own? You can't do nothing on your own. Everything you do, everything you think about, you need Me and you don't even realize it. And I'm an ever-present help in a time of need. Everything you do and everything you speak, everything about you, Brandon, you need Me. The moment you try to separate yourself from Me is separating yourself from the vine, and there's death in it. I am everything. I am all in all. Do you understand? There is nothing that you can do apart from Me, even power washing this house." I started to weep. I looked at the ground while I was power washing. I was so frustrated that day because we've had a really hard time. And I said, "God, help me to never think that I can do anything without You." I didn't want to bother Him, but I said, "Lord, if You could just help me with this water line thing. I'm having a real hard time here, and I need help." I can take care of this. I can handle it. I don't really need you over here on this, but if you could really help me out, just shaking me and making me realize that there's nothing I can do without him. Washing a dog, cleaning, mowing my grass whenever it's so high because of all the issues that we've had. Walking in every area of your life, being desperate for him to show up in every area. Even the things that you don't think that he wants to be involved in, he wants to be involved in. It doesn't matter what it is; he wants to be involved in it. And that's the place of desperation—allowing the Holy Spirit to move in every area of your life. And that's where I was asking him. I said, "Oh, so you feel you can do it without me?" It checked me really hard because I thought, "Well, of course, I don't need you to power wash the house." And you think you can do it without me? In all that you do, in word and in deed, do all for the glory of God. All that you do, all for the glory of God. I was challenged. I listened to what's in these life lessons, you know, with me planting flowers when he said to me, "You just arranged it. I caused the flowers to grow. I caused the earth to produce and put pressure on the seed. I caused the rain to fall on it. I was the one that was ahead of all of it, Brandon. And all you did was organize them. And I even gave you the wisdom to do that." Everything you do, there's nothing apart from me. Everything that you do is only through me. And in that, I am learning. When you think, "I'm a man, I can do this. I'm a man, I can fix my car. I'm a man, I can mow my grass." It's like, "Daddy, I don't need you to help tie my shoes anymore. I'm big now. You don't pick out my clothes anymore. I can pick my own clothes out, daddy." But even in that, listening to him and saying, "Father, I don't want to get dressed without you. What do you feel I should wear today?" Involving him in every area of your life. "Lord, I need you to tell me how to make my marriage stronger today. I need you to tell me how to be a better father to my children." No matter how many books I think I could read or whatever, it all is based solely out of him. And I know I don't want to keep going over this, but it's so important that I drive it home to you that he wants to be all in and all to you in every area of your life. And so as we see these things in the economy, I told you we do not let up off of things in prayer until we make it a greasy spot. You may see a little victory and a lot of people just go, "Well, we saw the first blade, then the ear," and people go, "Well, we can let it go through prayer. We don't have to attack it anymore." That's whenever you hit it harder and you hit it until it's a greasy spot. So, we see a judge. Everything's fine with XRP. Everything looks great. She goes and starts going against it. Instantaneously, people go, "Oh my gosh, the sky is falling with XRP again." And I said, "Isn't it amazing the very things the Lord tells us to pray over?" People give up on it and you let go of the rope. And then the enemy's there and he's doing tug-of-war and he goes and he tries to pull the rug right out from underneath you instantaneously because the body of Christ goes and pulls and goes, "Look, we won." And then the devil's like... and he pulls it and everybody goes, "Well, what happened there?" You didn't keep on keeping on. You underestimated your enemy. And that's what happens. It happens a lot with the body of Christ. Same thing we do with President Trump. We won. We won. Oh, good. We won. Oh, November! Woohoo! And now the Lord starts talking to me and said, "Brandon, are you going to pray for his safety? What's going on?" There's more things here that you need to understand, that there's more attacks on his life, attempts on his life. You need to pray for him. So, I'll just be doing my own thing and then the Lord told me, and I see more attempts—like it was with the ear—in the days ahead, worse. And we have FBI agents calling 86ing 47, and we see people calling for him to be removed and doing all this stuff. Well, I'm just saying I want him to be put in prison. That's not what he was saying. You have people that are threatening his life on a day-to-day basis, even in upper government. And I've told you all, if you don't pray for this man, he can't do it without help. No, it's time for the body of Christ to get more serious than what we've ever been serious before. And let's drive this thing home. Let's finish our race. Finish. Go long. Live long and finish strong. We need to live long and finish strong and finish our race with great victory until we get on the other side. And when we get over on the other side, then we take a break and we do our victory lap. We do our victory lap. We do our victory dance. I don't know what else to say. But until then, we are on battle mode. We've got our shield up. We're not looking at our enemy and going, "Well, he's already lost." Yeah, he's already lost. But we stay in a state of war with our sword and our shield in our hand going, "Hey, where's another devil? I'm going to cut this devil's head off and I'm going to keep warring against him." Because the moment you take your eye off your enemy, he's there ready to devour you. That's just the end times. You know why? Let me tell you why. Because he has a sense of urgency. What's his urgency? He knows his time is short. He has a sense of urgency. So where's the body of Christ's urgency right now? Well, you know, it's not convenient to go to prayer group on Sunday nights after church. So you have, you know, 20 people show up out of a church of over a thousand. That is pathetic. Where's the sense of urgency? You have the elders; you have the gray hairs in there—the people who are the pillars of the church that have been there—but the young people, they don't care. "I got to watch American Idol." Do you understand? If we do not pray it out in the spirit, it will never happen in the natural. You think that you get spiritual breakthrough just because it's just supposed to happen? It happens birthed out of the spirit first. Healings, demonstrations, manifestation. Azusa Street came out of major prayer first. Pensacola revival of John Kilpatrick came out of two years of intercessory prayer. Two years of praying. I don't know if it was twice a week or once a week, but they prayed and they did that for two years, and then on Father's Day, bam, the glory fell. Two years they prayed for revival. Azusa Street, I think it was like four years; William Seymour and them, they prayed in a little house. They prayed and prayed and prayed, and then God gave them a word. There was a great earthquake and it shook San Francisco, and then because they gave that prophetic word, people were going, "Who gave that accurate prophetic word?" and the glory showed up and they had to move it into a barn. God will show up in the most unlikely places. He shows up in a place of desperation. He shows up with the people who are desperate and hungry. He'll show up in a stable. Remember, he'll show up in a stable in a place where barn animals are—not fit for a king. But he shows up in a place of humility, not a place of arrogance. People who are arrogant leading prayer, people who are arrogant preaching at the church thinking, "Well, I've got my PhD." "I've got all this." Do you not know how many people have prophesied over me? Do you know how many people have imparted into me? Who cares? God resists the proud and exalts the humble. God exalts the humble. And the moment you have an attitude or an arrogant look, thinking like, "I can do this house without you, Lord. I don't need your help with that. I need this over there"—the moment you realize how much you have to learn, it's time to humble you. And I realize there is nothing outside of him. Even power washing a house, there is nothing outside of him. And many people feel they've got this. You don't have anything. You don't have anything. I can leave prayer, and the Lord told me, he said, "Baby, you can fake the anointing for so long until people will catch on. You can run on fumes, son for a while, but eventually people will catch on. There is nothing outside of me. I am the vine. You are the branch." That's why Jesus said, "I say nothing without hearing what my father says. I do nothing without doing what my father tells me to do." Because he realized there was a desperation in seeking his father on a day-to-day basis. And he was the Son of God, and he realized there was nothing he could do in this earth without him. He is the vine. I am the branch. I can do nothing outside of him. And so many people—if Jesus couldn't do it, how much more could we? How arrogant—the Son of God could do nothing without hearing what his father told him to do. I do nothing unless I'm instructed by my Lord. And Jesus was dead to himself. You know, that's what I have for you today. I feel I just want you to understand there's a place in God that the devil is afraid even to go. There's a place in God—Smith Wigglesworth talked about this—there is a place in God that Satan dare not go. He's scared of it. That's where I want to be. I want to be right at his feet. I want to be sitting at his feet, listening to him, listening to that still small voice—the still small voice of my good shepherd. I am the sheep and I am on that potter's wheel, even feeling it, "Well, there's a level of success. There's a level of this." It's all nothing without him. I don't care how anointed a prayer session is and the glory shows up—without him, he is that. But even then, I've seen some of the greatest ministers move under the anointing for just a part of that time. He shows up just to set the captives free. Just because you have an anointed service, an anointed time with the Lord, doesn't mean he truly knows you all the way. It doesn't. He can use whoever he wants just to get the job done because he loves the people. But whenever it's all said and done and the lights are off, I can turn them all off. Is he still there? Is he there whenever nobody else is watching? Who are you whenever the camera is not rolling? Who are you whenever you are sitting on the back row and you're watching and observing? Do you know how many times the Lord will reveal to me more—and I'm nothing special. I'll be real with you. I just walk in a gift. I just walk in a gift. How many times he shows up and he tells me, "Brandon, they have issues. Be careful with them. Don't allow them in your inner circle." What is he saying about you to other people whenever he is warning them about you? Do you see what I'm saying? He has an opinion about everything. What is his opinion about you? I question what people see about me from Billy Burke when they get around you. If they walk in any discernment, do they see anything bad? Everybody has a sense of something. For instance, my wife said lust has a feeling, and if a man has something bad, a woman can feel it whenever that man's looking at her. She says, "Oh, he's undressing me with his eyes." You see that? There is a spirit of lust that people carry. But you can be saturated enough, you can carry the Lord, and people can sense it on you. What do you carry? What is on you enough that people can sense it on you? Some people have gossip, some people have lust, some people have greed, some people have jealousy. Jealousy is stinky. You can sense it when somebody's jealous of what God's doing in your life and they don't feel like you deserve what you have and they feel they could do it better than you. And when they see you, they detest you. And you can feel that. You can feel that energy. You can feel that badness of what they're carrying. When you just get around them, you can tell they feel that you don't deserve what you have or the anointing where God's put you, and they feel because of where they're at that they could do it so much better. I have that all the time. I sense it all the time. I sense it in church. I sense it all the time. Maybe even with people that you would least expect it, but it's there. What do people sense about you? It's like that. Like I just said, there's some guys—he just hugs way too long. He's a little bit too familiar with the other ladies. Do you see? What do people sense about you? What do you carry? What do you carry about you? And that's why I always self-examine myself. What do people see about Brandon? Do they see that he's full of joy? Do they see that he's full of sadness? Do they see that he's full of insecurities, whatever? All I want them to see is not a distraction. Like I told you with my flesh, my clothes, I want them just to get what they're supposed to get and move on. Get what you came to get from the Holy Ghost. I don't want my flesh to be a distraction to anybody because I want to be so saturated that even like Moses, the glory shined on his face and everybody was freaked out about it. So they had to take a prayer shawl and they had to wrap his head in it because the glory was there. That's what I'm looking for. That's why I said test the ground where you give because it always trickles down where you sow your seeds. What happens is what comes on the leadership comes downhill. Crap always runs downhill, right? It always is that way spiritually too. So let's pray together today and see what the Lord has for you. I believe there's a lot here. I believe that there's an urgency of the hour to seek him. And as we see Israel, we see these things taking place. There's a lot of oil in the Mediterranean. There's oil. There's all this stuff. And we're about to see one of the greatest windows of opportunity. And the Lord said, "Brandon, I'd like to make that window bigger. I want you to enjoy life." And you know what's interesting to me? He says this a lot: "Brandon, when are you going to enjoy life? When are you going to have fun? Your kids are getting older." I have been a person who has pursued and pushed my whole life to get to where I am now. And then when you get to where you are now, you're not satisfied. And you try to push again. You think there's more. Well, yes, the Lord's called you to do more, but you have to enjoy the journey. And I've been a person who's just been so focused. I've got to get there. We've got to get this job done. Enjoy the journey. Enjoy your kids. And that's why he said, "The window's fun, Brandon. This window that I'm going to give to my body, these are days of great fun. A wealth transfer is going to be fun." What is fun? Getting souls saved, getting all the lost to do the things that he's called us to do. This is what's fun to the Father. If you, being evil, give good gifts to your children, how much more does the heavenly Father give good gifts to those that love him? He wants to give good gifts to you today. He's a good gift-giver. He's a giver of life. And he's a rewarder of those that diligently seek him. The Bible told us that he is a rewarder of those that diligently seek him. And as we seek Him, we will find Him. And I believe today is a day for you to have an opportunity to find our Father. Knock, and the door will be opened unto you. Seek, and you shall find. It's time to seek and knock, and the door will be opened. Let's seek Him: the big silver doors, the big bronze doors, the big things, everything He has for us. Let's open the doors, and God will open those that diligently seek Him. Seek Him today. Jesus Christ loves every single one of you. And there's nothing too big and there's nothing too small for Him to answer, because He loves and wants to be a blessing to you all in every area of your life: spiritually, physically, financially, mentally, emotionally, your marriages, everything. Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health, even as your soul prospers: your mind, your will, and your emotions. Father, we just thank You, Lord, for the body that was broken for us. Father, with all the things that are going on in the earth, there's so much that apart from You, we can do nothing. You are the vine, we are the branches. And I thank You, Father, that in that branch, in You, that vine today, we seek You. I thank You, Father, that we humble ourselves underneath the mighty hand of God, and in due time, You said You would exalt us with all the things that are going on in our lives, with all the things that are so overwhelming. And God, we seek You and we thank You, Father. No matter if we're leading a thousand people or 500 people or 10 million, Father, You're there. Thank You, Father, for whoever shows up and whoever is there, Father, that they would get something from You today. Touch their lives, Father, on another level. Father, I thank You, Lord, that they would have a deeper, intimate relationship with You beyond anybody's comprehension. Father, You are our ever-present help in a time of need. And I thank You, Father, that we become more familiar. We hear Your voice. We hear Your voice, and a stranger's voice we will not follow—the Good Shepherd. And Father, I thank You, Lord, that we delight ourselves in You, and You said You would give us the desires of our heart today. And Father, we lift up this body right now before You. We thank You, Lord, that You were wounded for us; You were bruised. You took it all on the cross for us. We don't have to be sick in our bodies anymore. And I thank You, Lord, that You've healed us from the top of our heads to the soles of our feet in the mighty name of Jesus. We take this, and we thank You, Lord, for it's already done. Now, Lord, I plead the blood over my children, over my wife, over my finances, over everything I put my hands to. Lord, I apply the blood of Jesus. And You said if we confess our sins, You are faithful and just to forgive us of our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. And Father, I confess that I've messed up. All have sinned and fallen short of the glory. All have sinned. But Father, we confess our sins, and You said that You're faithful and just to forgive us of our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness. Thank You for the blood today. We apply the blood, and we make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. We apply the blood over our minds, over our wills, our emotions, and we thank You, Lord, that You have a plan for our lives. We're always in the right place at the right time. We take it right now in Jesus' name. Thank You, Lord. Thank You, Lord, for Your friendship. Thank You, Father, that You are a friend. Thank You, Lord, that apart from You we can do nothing. There's nothing that I can do without Him, and there's everything I can do with Him. I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me today. Father, we lift up our president. We lift up the decisions and the war in Ukraine and Russia, and all that's going on, and all the drama. Father, we thank You, Lord, that they would come to the table and have peace in the name of Jesus. I know You said there would be wars and rumors of wars. There's a major shaking of all these different areas. You told me He's coming to get the people's attention. You said the enemy comes to kill, steal, and destroy, but 'I have come that you might have life, and life more abundantly.' And Lord, I thank You, Lord, that every single person who's here today, Father, has that abundant life flowing on the inside of them, that they're hearing You, Father, because Father, they're on that branch. They're on that vine. They're there. We are a part of You. Our life is given out of You. We're living and we're abiding in You. And You said, 'If ye abide in me, and my words abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will, and it shall be done.' Father, this word, this beautiful Bible, thank You, Father, for this word today. Father, this is the word that came and set the captives free. I thank You, Father. I thank You, Father, that Jesus, You said You were the Word. Father, I thank You, Lord, for the word that has set us free. You said, 'You shall know the truth, and the truth will set you free.' So, Father, I plead the blood over my spiritual eyes right now. And I thank You, Father, that I have eyes to see what You want me to see, and I have ears to hear what You want me to hear. And Father, we pray and we yield ourselves over. We will not entertain any satanic or demonic force. We will not entertain any kind of demonic spirit trying to mess with any visions, anything that You have for us. We will only hear what You want us to hear and see what You want us to see. And we plead the blood of Jesus over our eyes right now. Father, we delight ourselves in You, and You said You'd give us the desires of our hearts. Father, our heart's desire is to make You happy. Our heart's desire, Father, is to flow with You. Our heart's desire is to get as many unsaved saved as we can. Father, we call all our unsaved loved ones saved today in the mighty name of Jesus. I call them born again. I call them spirit-filled. I call them controlled by the Holy Ghost. And I thank You, Father, that they are free from the demonic strongholds that have held them back from the saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ.
